description_long: This is a compact, vintage-style car with a vibrant, psychedelic floral pattern covering its entire exterior. The car features a rounded body reminiscent of the classic Volkswagen Beetle, with chrome bumpers and trim. On the roof, there is a metal rack securely holding two colorful surfboards, one red and one pink, fastened with black straps. The windows are tinted blue, and the wheels are simple with a metallic finish. The car has four doors, and the overall design suggests a fun, beach-going lifestyle. The front and rear license plates are visible, with the front plate reading 'LOVE'.
description: A vintage, flower-patterned compact car with a roof rack carrying two surfboards, chrome details, and a playful, beach-inspired design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded hood, chrome bumper, floral pattern, and two surfboards on the roof rack.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the car's compact shape, four doors, surfboards on top, and detailed floral pattern.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back window, surfboards, chrome bumper, and the continuation of the floral design.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the car's profile, surfboards, and vibrant exterior.
attribute_headlight_design: dual round headlights with chrome trim
